SELECT member_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone
FROM members
WHERE
  (
    -- match first+last (case-insensitive, trimmed)
    lower(trim(first_name)) = lower(trim({{ inpFirstName.text }}))
    AND lower(trim(last_name)) = lower(trim({{ inpLastName.text }}))
  )
  OR (
    -- match email (case-insensitive, trimmed); skip if blank
    {{ inpEmail.text.trim() !== "" }} AND lower(trim(email)) = lower(trim({{ inpEmail.text }}))
  )
  OR (
    -- match phone; skip if blank
    {{ inpPhone.text.trim() !== "" }} AND regexp_replace(phone, '\D', '', 'g') = regexp_replace({{ inpPhone.text }}, '\D', '', 'g')
  )
LIMIT 5;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
          AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;

actionConfiguration.body:
WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
          AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
          AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;
